subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of My Name, the Most Beauteous, who sacrificed in My path and expended whatsoever he possessed out of love for My Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر اسمی الحسن الذی فدی فی سبیلی و انفق ما عنده حبا لجمالی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
